title: Mildly Spicy Vietnamese Fish Ca Kho To
description: A traditional Vietnamese dish made with fish, tamarind pulp, and spices, served with steamed vegetables, this ca kho to is a hearty and flavorful meal perfect for a sick day, featuring a balance of grassy and juicy textures.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and garlic and cook until fragrant.
Add the fish fillets and cook until browned on both sides.
Add the tamarind pulp, fish sauce, brown sugar, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the ca kho to for 10 minutes.
While the ca kho to is simmering, prepare the mushimono steam by boiling water in a steamer.
Add the chopped scallions to the steamer and steam until tender.
Serve the ca kho to with the steamed scallions and mushrooms.
